name: editor4b: Phase 3 — script-managed contenteditable routes input to script, native engine fires no edit
_note: Phase 3 exit-gate guard. The editor's contenteditable host carries data-script-edit, so Radiant delivers beforeinput to the JS handler (editing.beforeinput, prevented) but runs NO native rich transaction (editing.transaction count 0) and NO native apply. If the data-script-edit routing regressed, the legacy native rich-transaction would emit editing.transaction records and this fixture would fail.
